script.arcTitle: Netherlands and Morocco: A Match Replayed
script.openingLine: Welcome to a round-of-32 meeting between Netherlands and Morocco at Monterrey Stadium.

moments.spokenLine: Netherlands meet Morocco in the round of 32 at Monterrey Stadium.
moments.explainer: The replay begins with both sides level and the knockout tie under way.

moments.spokenLine: Ismael SAIBARI scores for Morocco, and the verified score moves to 0–1.
moments.explainer: Morocco take the lead immediately in the verified sequence.

moments.spokenLine: Ismael SAIBARI scores for Morocco again, and the verified score moves to 0–2.
moments.explainer: The score shows Morocco extending their advantage.

moments.spokenLine: Ismael SAIBARI scores for Morocco, and the verified score moves to 0–3.
moments.explainer: Morocco move three goals clear in the verified sequence.

moments.spokenLine: Wout WEGHORST scores for Netherlands, and the verified score moves to 1–3.
moments.explainer: Netherlands begin to pull the score back.

moments.spokenLine: Wout WEGHORST scores for Netherlands, and the verified score moves to 2–3.
moments.explainer: The gap narrows to one goal, bringing Netherlands back into the contest.
Morocco lead at half-time, but Netherlands are within one goal.

moments.spokenLine: Issa DIOP is shown a card for Morocco.
moments.explainer: Morocco receive a disciplinary mark early in the second half.

moments.spokenLine: Cody GAKPO scores for Netherlands, and the verified score moves to 3–3.
moments.explainer: The scores are level, completing Netherlands’ recovery in the verified sequence.

moments.spokenLine: Issa DIOP scores for Morocco, and the verified score moves to 3–4.
moments.explainer: Morocco regain the lead with the decisive swing shown in the verified score.
The match record closes level, with Morocco ahead on penalties.

chapters.text: At kick-off, Netherlands meet Morocco in the round of 32 at Monterrey Stadium.
At , Ismael SAIBARI scores for Morocco, and the verified score moves to 0–1.
At , Ismael SAIBARI scores for Morocco again, and the verified score moves to 0–2.
At , Ismael SAIBARI scores for Morocco, and the verified score moves to 0–3.
At , Wout WEGHORST scores for Netherlands, and the verified score moves to 1–3.
At , Wout WEGHORST scores for Netherlands, and the verified score moves to 2–3.
In the 47th minute, Issa DIOP is shown a card for Morocco.
In the 72nd minute, Cody GAKPO scores for Netherlands, and the verified score moves to 3–3.
In the 1st minute of second-half stoppage time, Issa DIOP scores for Morocco, and the verified score moves to 3–4.
At full-time, Netherlands 1–1 Morocco. 2–3 on penalties.
